title: roldana suffulta
intro: Roldana suffulta, also known as Mexican tarragon or yerba anis, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and parts of Central America, belonging to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Roldana suffulta include its ability to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Roldana suffulta is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, showcasing its versatility in traditional medicine.
